bulletin: Optional local bulletin. Use this for a pinned desk note, emergency reminder, or a quick town heads-up.

pinned.title: Example pinned town notice
pinned.description: Replace this with a real local item or delete it. Pinned items rise to the top.

stories.title: Example hand-picked story
